S.FORM: Steve Alford sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, p'aras mari' tay suruw. kawas tay 1964, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 11, Steve Alford, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: s~…ïte*e al*or* s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a, p îaras~…ï mari î taj s~…ïuruw. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj **, s~…ïte*e al*or*, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
